description: A message on the wall asks: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. What am I?
A metal gate blocks your way. A note reads: 3 + 4 x 2 = ?
Letters scratched into the wall read: TEAG
A whisper asks: The more you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
A carved stone slab asks: 5 x 3 - 4 = ?
A glowing vault door asks: I have keys but no locks. What am I?
A final barrier asks: I have cities but no houses, rivers but no water, forests but no trees. What am I?
